messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: The Operator keeps dropping — the channel is built, but nothing supervises the processes that own it
What it solves: THE ASK. A persistent, always-available Operator the human can talk to at any time — not one that
vanishes between messages.
How it works: The human can reach the Operator at any moment

messages.author: human
messages.text: Can you make these messages more readable?
